title: epidendrum geniculatum
intro: Epidendrum geniculatum, also known as the bent orchid or bent epidendrum, is a species of orchid that belongs to the Epidendrum genus and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Epidendrum geniculatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate sore throats, and soothe digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
